description: A complex multi-agent scenario where a billing agent must coordinate with a network specialist to resolve a high-bill complaint caused by technical faults.

nodes.task_description: Billing agent receives complaint and delegates technical investigation to network specialist.

expected_outcome.value: Delegation is recorded in the coordination namespace.

nodes.task_description: Network specialist performs diagnostics and writes findings to the network namespace.
Billing agent reads network findings and applies credit.

expected_outcome.value: Credit applied based on technical evidence.
